sys_script.description: IDP AI Event Hook — when a change request (deployment) transitions to state 4 (Cancelled/Failed), trigger IDPAIOrchestrator.onDeploymentFailure to generate root cause suggestions. Only runs if AI is enabled.
sys_script.name: IDP - AI Root Cause on Deployment Failure
sys_script.sys_name: IDP - AI Root Cause on Deployment Failure
